---
title: "Letters of Frederic, Lord Blachford, under-secretary of state for the colonies, 1870-1871 edited by George Eden Marindin"
---

## Letters of Frederic, Lord Blachford, under-secretary of state for the colonies, 1870-1871 edited by George Eden Marindin

**Author:** Frederic Rogers
**Date:** 1896
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
